title: Skniro's Nether and End Ores
description: A simple mod add Nether and End Ores. It will generation in nether and end and make nether survival is easy then vanilla.
body:
![2023-07-30 180910.png](https://s2.loli.net/2023/07/30/7MJAV4wBUKNgHil.png)

**Skniro's Nether and End Ores**

A simple mod add Nether Ores. It will generation in nether and make nether survival is easy then vanilla.

They are no different from ordinary ores,except that they are generated in the nether.

For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!
